query: Can you plot an HR diagram for the 700 nearest stars?

execution.adql: SELECT TOP 700 source_id, parallax, phot_g_mean_mag, bp_rp, ra, dec, pmra, pmdec, (phot_g_mean_mag + 5*LOG10(parallax/100)) AS abs_g_mag FROM gaiadr3.gaia_source WHERE parallax > 1 AND bp_rp IS NOT NULL ORDER BY random_index
